milestone: Cloud-Primary Project Storage — Phase 3: cloud-first Welcome screen + Storage Meter repurpose
slice: Generalizes the existing Linked/Related/Orphan classifier (_annotateCloudLink/_relatedBackupCard/_refreshCloudWorlds), not a replacement. Linked now branches on whether the Project is the one CURRENTLY OPEN: openWorkspace()'s own _checkCloudFreshness human-decision modal for the genuinely-open Project is unchanged, but any OTHER Linked card silently pulls in a newer cloud copy and re-renders (currentProject is never nulled just by navigating Home, confirmed directly). Orphan (no local match at all) now auto-materializes directly into My World Projects with zero manual click -- the old dedicated _orphanBackupCard/"Sync to This Device" button is deleted as dead code, since materializing an Orphan can never overwrite local data. Related is unchanged; My Cloud Worlds is retitled "Related Backups" now that it's a smaller, purely diagnostic strip for that one remaining case. A real ordering bug was caught and fixed BEFORE any test ran against it: an early draft had _annotateCloudLink call renderMyWorlds() directly mid-loop, which would have rebuilt the DOM and invalidated every card/info reference the rest of that same rows.forEach iteration still expected -- fixed by having it return true/false and letting _refreshCloudWorlds re-render exactly once, after the whole loop completes. Storage Meter is repurposed, not deleted: the quota-percentage bar (a 5MB reference floor now meaningless against IndexedDB's much larger real quota) is retired for a calmer "N Worlds cached" + real ProjectCache.getPendingSyncCount()-driven cloud-sync status line. Explicitly deferred, disclosed: the plan's own "deleted-elsewhere" flagged-card edge case is not implemented this phase -- no data-loss risk in the meantime, since the classification loop only ever adds/refreshes, never deletes, a local card. Verified via a new 15-assertion Playwright suite (Orphan auto-materialize with zero click; the Linked split proven with two real local Projects -- A silently refreshes with no confirm() dialog, B stays currentProject and is confirmed NOT silently overwritten, showing the manual Load It button which still works when clicked; the Storage Meter's new framing with the old bar confirmed absent) plus both goldenBuild.js suites (30/30 each), zero console errors. Two pre-existing scratch scripts' own Orphan-specific assertions are now stale by design (their other scenarios pass unchanged) -- the disclosed, intended consequence of this phase, not a regression. No Theme Contract/Engine V2 Scene Model/Creator Governing Rules change, no supabase/schema.sql change. Phases 4 (Studio ProjectStore rewire + CreatorProjectSync.push() versioned-conflict hardening), 5 (Studio cloud-first restore/My-Projects freshness), 6 (final verification + docs/PROJECT_CLOUD_ARCHITECTURE.md + ship) remain named, not-yet-started increments -- see CLAUDE.md's own entry and the plan file's phased rollout section.
